256 G8C G8C_SLOW (G8C) Resident Able to Perform Tasks/Activity but is Slow CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: ADL functional rehabilitatio potential - resident is slow performing tasks/activity. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
